specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Dual-core 2.5 GHz (e.g., Intel Core i3 from 2011 or similar)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GPU with at least 1 GB dedicated memory (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 650, AMD Radeon HD 7770, or newer integrated graphics like Intel UHD 630)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: SSD recommended for faster loads; Laptop versions are fine on high-performance mode

  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
